items.title: WC final tickets listed on FIFA resale at over $2M
items.summary: FIFA's resale site has four tickets on sale for the World Cup final for just under $2.3 million each.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Women's basketball transfer portal tracker: Addy Brown joins the champs at UCLA, Audi Crooks to Oklahoma State
items.summary: Brown and Crooks were teammates at Iowa State, one of the programs that lost a litany of players to the portal
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Gaikwad dedicates CSK's 103-run win against MI to Mukesh Choudhary
items.summary: The left-arm seamer played his part in CSK's win against MI following the death of his mother on Tuesday
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
